final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from the Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传) IP.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic inspired by Pixar-style rendering — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3x3 grid layout with 9 panels, each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, across 9 expression panels:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper holes as framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, expressive character showcase atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied wardrobe direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a 3D-rendered surface treatment — exact skin sheen and fabric weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panel expressions, outfits, and actions exactly as specified; must maintain consistent character likeness (Zhao Ling'er) across all panels
Avoid:
